subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, turned his face towards Him, and tasted the cup of His love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله و اقبل الی وجهه و ذاق فی حبه کاس
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @consolation and comfort, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
